# Carbonate Ramp

**Summary**: A gently sloping carbonate platform.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] characterized the carbonate-ramp evolution of the Hanifa Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] determines the spatial distribution of reservoir facies.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] interpreted from lithofacies and sedimentological features.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation evolved from a homoclinal to a reef-bearing carbonate ramp. ([[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022, p. 52]])
